query:
INSERT INTO product_metadata (
    product_id,
    invoice_number,
    thrift_store_name,
    style_description,
    material_description,
    custom_information,
    image1_url,
    image2_url,
    image3_url,
    image4_url,
    image1_alt,
    image2_alt,
    image3_alt,
    image4_alt,
    created_at,
    updated_at
) VALUES (
    1,
    'INV-2026-001',
    'Salvation Army Auckland',
    'Classic vintage denim with authentic worn-in look and original hardware',
    '100% cotton heavyweight denim with reinforced stitching',
    'Sourced from premium donation batch - excellent condition',
    'https://manus-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/urban-refit/products/1/image-1-abc123def.jpg',
    'https://manus-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/urban-refit/products/1/image-2-abc123def.jpg',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'Front view showing full garment silhouette',
    'Close-up of stitching and fabric texture',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
);

INSERT INTO product_metadata (
    product_id,
    invoice_number,
    thrift_store_name,
    style_description,
    material_description,
    custom_information,
    image1_url,
    image2_url,
    image3_url,
    image4_url,
    image1_alt,
    image2_alt,
    image3_alt,
    image4_alt,
    created_at,
    updated_at
) VALUES (
    2,
    'INV-2026-002',
    'Red Cross Wellington',
    'Contemporary streetwear style with bold graphic elements',
    'Premium cotton blend with moisture-wicking properties',
    'Limited edition piece from designer collaboration',
    'https://manus-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/urban-refit/products/2/image-1-xyz789ghi.jpg',
    'https://manus-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/urban-refit/products/2/image-2-xyz789ghi.jpg',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'Full body shot on neutral background',
    'Detail shot of print quality and fabric weave',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
);

INSERT INTO product_metadata (
    product_id,
    invoice_number,
    thrift_store_name,
    style_description,
    material_description,
    custom_information,
    image1_url,
    image2_url,
    image3_url,
    image4_url,
    image1_alt,
    image2_alt,
    image3_alt,
    image4_alt,
    created_at,
    updated_at
) VALUES (
    3,
    'INV-2026-003',
    'Hospice Shop Christchurch',
    'Timeless formal wear suitable for business or special occasions',
    'Fine wool blend with silk lining for comfort',
    'Professionally dry cleaned and inspected',
    'https://manus-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/urban-refit/products/3/image-1-lmn456opq.jpg',
    'https://manus-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/urban-refit/products/3/image-2-lmn456opq.jpg',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'Complete outfit view with proper draping',
    'Close-up of button and lapel construction',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
);
